query:
UPDATE ranking_players rp
        SET rank_position = ranked.new_rank::int4
        FROM (
            SELECT player_id,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY computed_rating DESC NULLS LAST) AS new_rank
            FROM ranking_player_scores
            WHERE ranking_id = $1
        ) ranked
        WHERE rp.player_id = ranked.player_id
          AND rp.ranking_id = $1
